profile.name: Mashrure Tanzim
profile.summary: Full-stack web developer with 6 years of experience building Laravel, PHP, Vue, React, and Shopify-based solutions.
profile.about_text: I have been working for 6 years as a full stack developer. During my tenure I worked with php (cakephp and laravel), html, css, javascript (both raw and vue.js), React with Polaris for Shopify, MYSQL and some rudimentary wordpress. I led a team as a focal point to complete given projects. I have worked on more than 15 projects related to the a2i initiative of the ministry. Currently I work with Shopify Platforms to develop e-commerce apps.
facts: Core Stack: Laravel, PHP, JavaScript, Vue, React

github.title: View GitHub Profile
github.description: I am a web developer working mainly with PHP, CakePHP, Laravel, JavaScript, Vue, React, Java, SQL, HTML, and Shopify Polaris.

linkedin.title: View LinkedIn Profile
linkedin.description: I started my career as a junior IT officer in Notre Dame University Bangladesh, then spent 5 years as a full stack web developer at Business Automation Ltd., and currently work at Klinkode as a Software Engineer focused on Laravel and React. If you wish to contact me, you can find me at tanzimndub@gmail.com.

experiences.description: Responsible for full stack development of various Shopify apps. Task included frontend development, backend development, database and query management and reseach of new technologies that might be incorporated into the company. I was involved in Development of various Shopify apps like CartLock, Savify, Shipright etc.

Responsible for full stack development of various php websites. Task included frontend development, backend development, database and query management, training up young professionals and reseach of new technologies that might be incorporated into the company tech stack. Sites included CRM, e-commerce, school management and various govt. projects like e-mutation, tourism portal, e-hajj, BTRC, BIDA and BRCP.
experiences.reference: Reference: MD. KAMRUZZAMAN, Senior Software Engineer, Business Automation Ltd., Mobile: +88 01712018755, E-mail: zaman@batworld.com

experiences.description: The main responsibility was maintaining the library and admission management software. Other tasks included managing the equipment of 3 computer labs and the server room. This entailed soft skills like audit and purchase, but also minor repair jobs for faulty devices.
experiences.reference: Reference: A.H.M. SAIFUL ISLAM, Associate Professor, Chairman, Department of CSE, Notre Dame University Bangladesh, Mobile: +88 01924955431, E-mail: saiful@ndub.edu.bd

projects.title: Enterprise Business Solution of Business Automation
projects.short_description: A CRM site that handles employee and partner interactions. It can manage attendance, projects, internal billings, partner contacts and requisitions and much more. It also has some partner sites that work together to form a network.
projects.description:
Business Automation Ltd. introduce a standard EBS or Enterprise Business Solution, as a set of cloud base application, block chain technology that provide easy-to-use, scalable, high-performance block-storage services, business flow process, store data, maintain data flow, analysis data, generate report, publishing news bulletin and store data for any organizations.

BA System’s EBS has various features included as Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) and Supply Chain Management (SCM) with data analysis.

Business Automation Ltd.’s Enterprise Business Solution (EBS) has a vision to make a sustainable business organization that organizations can get empower complete digital platform with the largest customer experience using update technology, data, and connectivity with people.
highlights: Built API to connect sub projects like Partner Portal and Support Ticket Portal under the same database umbrella.
Built a centralized file storage system called Document Management System (DMS) that could handle attachments for all modules accessible to the logged in user.
Built a recruitment system module that could post jobs in the notice section and also the central company portal.
Built a support ticket resolver module that handled complaints from both public and employees.
Designed and implemented between 2019–2022,prior to widespread AI-assisted development tools.
Worked on a User module that handled a multi-layered access system for different features and modules of the site.

projects.title: Event Reminder
projects.short_description: A simple event reminder app with an alert system
projects.description: An event reminder app that sends both email alerts and in-app notifications for various entries made in a calendar. Admin level users can also create meetings while the others can only see them.
highlights: Built a notification system that sent alerts via email and via an inbuilt cron that checks for updates every minute.
Designed and implemented without AI-assisted development tools.
Built a data import feature where the admin can import data directly to the database via an excel file.

projects.title: HR
projects.short_description: An app for HR attendance and vacation management
projects.description: Built with Laravel and Polaris. We have two types of users: Employee and Admin. They are defined by the 'Roles' radio button. An employee can check in for daily attendance and apply for leave. An admin can approve/reject the leaves but can not apply himself or check in. But he has access to additional modules like Settings and Users. Settings defines app configurations like office time, default leave days etc. Users module handles new user creation. Only the admin can create new users. New users cant register themselves, so to make new users, we must login as an admin. Read the readme for login details.
highlights: Built a system to track the attendance and leave of multiple employees with charts and graphs to improve readability.
Built an automatic leave system that dynamically assigns attendance status based on time of login.
Built a settings module that can assign the time at which an employee will be automatically rendered late or absent. Changeable timezone.
Built a leave system that can dynamically alter how many leaves of a type an employee can have per year.

projects.title: Task Manager
projects.short_description: A simple task manager app for task management and alerts
projects.description: The simple task manager is a web app build with Laravel and React. It uses shopify polaris and tailwind css to handle frontend. The admin level users can create tasks and the others can see and complete those tasks.
highlights: Built a task management system which handled pending and completed tasks for a team or a single user.
Built a calendar that tracks completed tasks this month

professional_projects.short_description: A govt. website to automatically handle land mutation system
